description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat, overhanging roof and a clean, rectangular form. The front features a covered porch area with visible support columns and a wide entrance, while the rear and sides have large, evenly spaced windows. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the dark roof and the brown paved driveway that extends from the front. The structure sits on a raised concrete foundation, and the overall design emphasizes horizontal lines and open spaces. The windows are large and arranged in a regular pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The architectural style is minimalist, with a focus on functionality and simplicity.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a covered front porch, set on a raised foundation with a long driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, entrance, and the long driveway leading up to the bungalow.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, upper and lower windows, and the full length of the building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with large windows and the raised foundation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the window arrangement and the extension of the driveway past the building.
